text.title: Retention and HR Compliance Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Retention and HR Compliance. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: scope-population
step.action: Define the population, time window, and regulatory frame.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: analyze-attrition
step.action: Segment by tenure, manager, function; pick top driver.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: audit-controls
step.input: Regulatory scope list, recruiting + HR process docs
step.action: Map each in-scope regulation to a control owner and evidence artefact.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: prioritize-fixes
step.action: Rank by impact × feasibility; assign owner + deadline per item.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: draft-report
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
